title: Rodéo
summary:
Rodéo may refer to:

Rodéo (riot), rioting-related body of strategy and tactics
Titled works:
Rodéo (Lucky Luke), 1949 in the Lucky Luke series
Rodéo (Zazie album), 2004 music album by singer-songwriter Zazie
